DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Neil Eisenberg, Esq. 415.956.3567 Eisenberg Law Office for Plaintiff.
Ronak Patel, Esq. 925-949-2792 Littler for Defendant Safeway

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received on both motions.

ARGUED. The Court hears both motions simultaneously. Defense' counsel Mr. Patel contests and presents argument re: breach of implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing claim, and that Plaintiff has pled a prima facie claim; no existence of a contract, no elements. The Court comments. Mr. Eisenberg has nothing further to add. Mr. Patel offers a brief rebuttal.
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling on both motions.

1 - Defendant Safeway, Inc's demurrer to Plaintiff's Second Amended Complaint for Wrongful Termination is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

The Court signs two orders. (see scanned order for details)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Neil D. Eisenberg, Esq., of Eisenberg Law Office, Tel: 415-956-3567 for Plaintiff.
Patek Ronak, Esq., of LITTLER MENDELSON, P.C., Tel: 925-932-2468 for defendant.

Hearing held. A timely Notice of Contest was received from Plaintiff's counsel. Plaintiff's counsel requests, if possible, that the matter be sustained with leave to amend. However, defendant's counsel opposes the request, arguing that further amendment would be futile, as the complaint has already been amended multiple times.The matter argued/discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.'S DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

**An order SUSTAINING with leave to amend DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT FOR WRONGFUL TERMINATION is signed after the hearing.***
